entities.name: ASIA
entities.description: The continent where the dryland regions discussed are located

entities.name: DRYLAND AGRICULTURE
entities.description: Agricultural practices and systems in dryland regions of Asia

entities.name: FOOD SECURITY
entities.description: The state of having reliable access to a sufficient quantity of affordable, nutritious food

entities.name: INCOME GROWTH
entities.description: The increase in financial earnings for people involved in dryland agriculture

entities.name: POVERTY REDUCTION
entities.description: The process of reducing the number of people living in poverty in dryland regions

entities.name: ENVIRONMENTAL SUSTAINABILITY
entities.description: The maintenance of ecological balance and resource health in dryland agriculture

entities.name: AGRICULTURAL DIVERSIFICATION
entities.description: The practice of increasing the variety of crops or agricultural activities to reduce risk

entities.name: TRADE LIBERALIZATION
entities.description: The removal or reduction of restrictions or barriers on the free exchange of goods between nations

entities.name: COMMERCIAL ORIENTATION OF AGRICULTURE
entities.description: Shifting agriculture from subsistence to market-oriented production

entities.name: INSTITUTIONAL INNOVATIONS
entities.description: New organizational or systemic changes to improve agricultural governance and delivery

entities.name: POLICY
entities.description: Governmental guidelines and regulations affecting dryland agriculture

entities.name: RESEARCH PRIORITIES
entities.description: Focused areas of scientific investigation to improve dryland agriculture

entities.name: DEVELOPMENT PATHWAYS
entities.description: Strategic routes for the socio-economic advancement of dryland agriculture
